name: Lee Evans
bio: Lee Evans is an English comedian and actor known for high-energy, physical and sweat-drenched stand-up performances. Rising through the comedy circuit in the early 1990s, he won the Perrier Award in 1993 and went on to stage record-breaking arena tours. He also appeared in films including The Fifth Element before retiring from stand-up in 2014.

timeline.ev: Wins the Perrier Award at the Edinburgh Fringe
Cinema debut in Funny Bones, winning a Best Actor award in Paris
Big Live at the O2 becomes the UKs top-selling Christmas DVD
Roadrunner tour grosses a record sum

accolades: Paris Film Festival Award for Best Actor for Funny Bones (1995)
Held records for top-selling stand-up comedy DVDs
